navigation.role: current focus, status, exits, evidence, selectors, and open work

resource_classes.policy: Update with the owning change; status exists only in governance/project.json.
Accepted ADRs are append-only and are superseded by a new ADR.
Read only when linked by a contract or exit; primary sources remain authoritative.
Preserve observations and supersession notices; never use as current status.
Run or regenerate from declared inputs; do not hand-edit generated evidence.
Local and excluded from Apache history; package only under an approved rights profile.

glossary.definition: Authoritative PICO-8 VM, memory, timing, input, persistence, raster, and audio state.
Replaceable 1024 visual layer that cannot mutate compatibility state.
Stable product outcome whose wording is owned by the PRD.
Binary acceptance condition attached to exactly one requirement.
Durable artifact supporting an exit; implementation alone is insufficient.
Unchanged-cart execution using only ordinary button masks for every logical update, with no hooks, state edits, skips, or synthetic completion.
Stable command identifier that validates named exits.
Versioned non-interactive pipeline operation with declared inputs and outputs.
Independent permission and attribution decision required for publication.
Late thin orchestration layer over proven Jobs and contracts.
Versioned private build input for one validated remake; not a promised public cartridge format.
Standalone product that statically binds several independently validated game modules and isolated saves.
Immutable declaration that fans multiple authorized carts into isolated Job graphs and acceptance records.
Stable roadmap unit that defines dependency-bounded tasks and acceptance Exit links without owning status.
Ordered presentation record that preserves original P8SCII bytes, compatibility metrics, state, side-effect boundaries, and modernization eligibility.
Versioned mapping from semantic text roles to bundled font assets, layout, complete coverage, licensing, and diagnostic reference policy.

Per-element identity evidence drives one coherent deterministic modern grammar; reusable semantic geometry, fonts, procedural forms, and frozen rasters are selected by role rather than forced into one asset format.

exits.statement: Authorized corpus resources round-trip without semantic loss.
Workspace and provenance payloads have versioned schemas and public fixtures.
An unchanged private representative cart boots and completes its first replay in the native core.
Complete indexed raster and draw state match official checkpoints.
Native and WebAssembly replay, frame, and command checkpoints are byte-identical.
Licensed official-runtime state, raster, input, persistence, and audio goldens match.
Canonical 128-to-1024 transform and derived profiles pass contract tests.

Every replacement preserves declared silhouette, anatomy/key parts, proportions, face/expression, color hierarchy, footprint, motion, and gameplay cues under one visual grammar, using reviewed frozen assets and deterministic render rules.
Every reachable visual state has a coherent modern mapping; accepted HD replays contain zero mixed indexed elements and zero scene-atomic reference switches.
HD enabled and disabled produce identical compatibility state for the complete replay.
Built-in/custom P8SCII pixels, metrics, cursor state, timing, memory, and audio side effects match licensed official checkpoints.
Native and Wasm emit identical versioned semantic text runs with raw bytes, original metrics/state, side-effect boundaries, and safety classification.
Bundled fixed-version MSDF/SDF or WOFF2 assets render deterministic readable text with complete declared glyph coverage and no OS-font dependency.
Every reachable text run has an approved coherent modern mapping; reference-only and review-required runs cannot appear in accepted HD frames.
Typography passes size, contrast, language coverage, delivery-profile layout, and assistive-text review without changing compatibility state.
Browser loads the Wasm kernel and runs a representative cart with keyboard input.
Responsive PWA build restores saves and exposes compatibility diagnostics.
Versioned internal game-module and Web target schemas round-trip public synthetic fixtures and assemble without a public cartridge contract.
One validated internal game module builds as a standalone Web/PWA product with no external Player or cartridge dependency.
At least three independently validated modules assemble into one fixed collection with runtime reset, isolated saves, complete licenses, and bounded startup/memory.
A versioned batch manifest creates immutable per-cart identities, isolated workspaces, Job state, evidence, retries, and results.
A failed cart neither blocks eligible siblings nor enters assembly, and the batch report cannot collapse partial success into completion.

The validated browser Web artifact is packaged unchanged through the Android WebView host as signed APK/AAB artifacts that pass lifecycle, audio focus, storage, controller, touch, orientation, resume, lineage, and clean-build tests.

Named Linux handhelds run the same validated Web artifact through browser/PWA or a justified thin Web shell and pass controller, storage, offline, lifecycle, performance, lineage, and clean-install tests.
A named ESP32-P4 board runs the same compatibility truth and game-module contract within recorded flash, internal RAM, PSRAM, frame, boot, audio, input, storage, and power budgets.
A reproducible signed/hashed firmware or OTA artifact completes a representative replay on hardware without a JavaScript VM or alternate gameplay implementation.
Core 30/60 Hz button state and repeat behavior pass current conformance tests.

Keyboard, controller, and touch map to identical logical input traces, while Enter/P, controller, and touch menu requests invoke source menuitem callbacks without entering the six-button gameplay mask.
Canonical unchanged-cart input completes title, all 30 levels, ending, persistence, restart, and original quirks in the private trial.
Complete deterministic modern art, UI, animation, effects, and text preserve source identity and cover every canonically replayed state with zero mixed-style fallback.
Keyboard, controller, and touch reproduce the canonical completion trace without feel drift.
A validated Web/PWA package is reproducible from a clean checkout plus authorized private input.

Replay v1 rejects hooks, mutation, input gaps, skipped updates, invalid masks, broken lineage, malformed or undeclared source menu actions, missing host executors, and missing completion milestones; replay semantic identity binds every executed input and host action.

Every search-model transition exercised by a candidate trace matches the unchanged cart for declared observable state, source-meaningful ordered progression boundaries retain exact milestone identities, and mutation regressions prove semantic drift is detected without game-specific exceptions.
Dust Bunny completes levels 1–30, ending, persistence, and restart on the unchanged cart through provenance-linked canonical real-input replay.

The accepted Dust Bunny reference and one materially different human-supervised transfer trial close their declared semantic, representative visual, HD-invariance, input, evidence-isolation, and ordered human-review boundaries; only a candidate promoted to a complete artifact must additionally close every progression and package boundary.

The reference and supervised transfer trial exercise materially different declared risks, classify reusable versus source-relative decisions, and introduce no runtime game-specific simulation forks or universal-coverage claim.
Release manifest, checksums, notices, validation, accessibility, and performance gates pass.
Publication permission and attribution are recorded independently of build readiness.
Agents find the correct owner and lifecycle class from one bounded entry path.
PRD, architecture, APIs, Jobs, and data use consistent IDs and owner boundaries.
Requirements, exits, implementation, evidence, selectors, and open work form a closed graph.
A new agent can implement, test, recover, diagnose, and hand off without chat history.
Core navigation, owner count, line budgets, and research isolation remain within policy.
The clean public history contains the Apache-2.0 project license and no secrets, private inputs, official captures, or cart-derived evidence.
The same-name GitHub repository is public, its default branch uses the clean history, and public CI passes.
The accepted reference and materially different supervised transfer trial close their declared human-in-the-loop gates before Skill design.
A thin Skill invokes stable Jobs without embedding runtime or policy logic and enforces human pauses for semantics, art direction, representative gameplay, and final scope.

open_items.next_action: Define workspace/provenance JSON Schemas and public synthetic round-trip fixtures.

Keep deterministic diagnostic playback separate from conformance: a bounded no-recursion custom-instrument/custom-waveform subset now requires explicit pre-execution opt-in, records sticky used flags plus a ledger event, and remains rejected by canonical qualification. stat(24)/stat(54) route the manual-defined current music pattern and stat(57) routes actual music-active state; the other stat(46..56) tick-history selectors, filters, custom instruments, and custom waveforms remain fail-closed until licensed official PCM/tick-history captures qualify them. Calibrate relative-pitch/effect/retrigger/PCM behavior and record browser latency/underrun evidence before promoting any further capability.

Retain deterministic tline, secondary-palette fillp, embedded colour-argument patterns, clipped complement inversion, map sprite-zero override, out-of-range read registers, extended display-palette indices, oval/ovalfill, and rrect/rrectfill with native/VM/Wasm/Web coverage. Capture licensed official tline/fillp/embedded-state/ellipse/rounded-rectangle/inverted-edge/fixed-point/extended-colour probes, apply corrections to the shared raster, and only then verify the exit.

A fail-closed, provenance-bound `pico8 -x` capture path and curved-raster probe are ready. Install or supply a licensed official PICO-8 executable, capture every normative matrix probe below ignored `captures/official/`, add screenshot/WAV captures where stdout cannot observe display RGB or PCM, and only then promote official goldens.

Retain Unicode-display-glyph normalization plus the static P8SCII executor whose 14-result manual-expectation probe covers built-in metrics, custom/inline pixels, cursor/color/background state, raw writes, outlines, and underline in native and Wasm. Complete delayed/frame-yield printing and P8SCII audio on qualified scheduler/audio paths, then capture licensed official built-in/custom pixel, timing, memory, and PCM fixtures before verifying this exit.
Implement the kernel text-run IR with anchors, metrics, side-effect boundaries, and custom-font state, then prove native/Wasm byte identity before feeding the validated modernization inventory.
Use the fixed Atkinson assets through the validated manifest, then build deterministic subset/atlas outputs and responsive layout goldens; contract capability alone does not verify rendering.
Generate complete reachable inventories from canonical replay/probes and prove every accepted HD frame consumes only complete-for-hd mappings with no diagnostic or unresolved blocker content.
Add contrast, minimum-size, CJK/localization coverage, responsive layout, and assistive-text validation.
Defer collection implementation until three independently validated games exist; then prove launcher, reset, save, license, and budget isolation.
After the complete browser Web package passes, define the Android WebView target profile and prove identical Web-artifact lineage plus the signed APK/AAB lifecycle matrix.
After Android evidence, name representative Linux handhelds, try the browser/PWA artifact first, and introduce a thin Web shell only for a recorded capability gap.
Keep ESP32-P4 outside current milestones; after a new product decision, name the board and publish measured memory, frame, boot, audio, input, storage, and power budgets.

Do not start under current milestones; after a new ESP32 product decision and measured board profile, build and replay a reproducible firmware/OTA artifact using the selected native kernel and derived assets.
Keep the current no-formal-release decision; any future publication must record CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 compliance or separate permission.

current_focus.objective: Close the remaining deterministic PICO-8 compatibility gaps that directly affect faithful Web remakes: licensed official raster and audio evidence, unchanged-cart boot behavior, and fail-closed semantics. Keep Dust Bunny as the accepted HD reference, Steps as the retained supervised transfer trial, and the verified thin Skill as the human-guided orchestration layer. Do not add cloud approval, autonomous ten-game qualification, desktop, iOS, or embedded work to the current critical path.
